parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.id,
  p.listing_id,
  p.title,
  p.price AS current_price,
  ph.price AS previous_price,
  p.price_currency,
  p.bedrooms,
  p.bathrooms,
  p.property_type,
  p.suburb,
  p.city,
  p.province,
  p.url,
  p.source,
  ROUND(((ph.price - p.price) / ph.price * 100)::numeric, 2) AS drop_percentage,
  (ph.price - p.price) AS drop_amount,
  ph.recorded_at AS previous_price_date
FROM properties p
JOIN price_history ph ON ph.property_id = p.id
WHERE ph.recorded_at = (
  SELECT MAX(ph2.recorded_at)
  FROM price_history ph2
  WHERE ph2.property_id = p.id
  AND ph2.recorded_at < CURRENT_DATE
)
AND p.price < ph.price
AND ((ph.price - p.price) / ph.price * 100) >= 3
AND p.status = 'active'
AND p.updated_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '2 days'
ORDER BY drop_percentage DESC
LIMIT 50;

SELECT 
  ss.id AS search_id,
  ss.user_email,
  ss.user_name,
  ss.user_phone,
  ss.max_price,
  ss.min_bedrooms,
  ss.province_filter,
  ss.property_type_filter,
  ss.notify_whatsapp,
  ss.notify_email
FROM saved_searches ss
WHERE ss.active = true
AND ss.notify_price_drops = true;

parameters.subject: Price Drop Alert - {{ $json.matching_drops }} property price drop(s) matching your search
